## Review Type

- [ ] Handbook content update
- [ ] New article source
- [ ] Sandbox Skill draft
- [ ] Approved Skill update
- [ ] Website/UI change

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No external Skill is auto-enabled.
- [ ] No external shell command is executed by the site.
- [ ] Customer-facing content is clear and non-crashing.
- [ ] `npm run check` passed.
- [ ] `npm run build` passed.
